title: Cam-Follower Mechanism
goal: A cam-follower system converts continuous rotary motion into precisely controlled linear or oscillating motion. The cam profile determines the exact output motion, enabling custom motion sequences.
parts: Cam: Rotating element with specially shaped profile
Follower: Element maintaining contact with cam surface
Pushrod: Transfers motion from follower to output
Return Spring: Maintains follower contact with cam
Base: Supports cam shaft and guide for follower
advantages: Precise control over output motion profile
disadvantages: Wear on cam surface over time
Potential for follower jump at high speeds
materials: Hardened steel or alloy for cam
cautions: Ensure adequate spring force to prevent follower jump
Check cam profile for discontinuities or sharp edges
Limit operating speed to avoid vibration
Regularly inspect for wear on contact surfaces
Verify follower alignment to prevent binding
